name: development/generate
description: Generate a new command from a CommandSpec JSON definition. Pass a spec file path, inline JSON, or request a template. The generator produces 8 files: Types (params, result, factories, static accessor), browser/server implementations, README, tests, package.json.

params.name: spec
params.description: CommandSpec as file path, inline JSON string, or object. Use --template to get a starter spec instead.

params.name: template
params.description: Return an example CommandSpec template instead of generating

params.name: force
params.description: Overwrite existing command directory if it exists

results.name: filesCreated
results.description: Array of file paths that were created

results.name: commandPath
results.description: Base directory path where command was generated
